title: Starry Express
description: A Harpy Express/WATHE addon mod that focuses on roles, decoration, and quality-of-life features. Yes, this is the mod with the Role Guidebook.
body:
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/starexpress) [![github](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/AussieBox/StarryExpress)
[![patreon-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_vector.svg)](https://patreon.com/aussiebox) [![discord-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/9m2HXggUHg)
Starry Express is an addon mod for [WATHE](https://modrinth.com/mod/wathe) by doctor4t. To learn how to play WATHE alongside addon mods like this one, check out agmas' video:

This mod is intended to be played in the WATHE Modpack alongside other addon mods, like Stupid Express and Noelle's Roles, but it will work just fine without other addon mods installed. ## The Guidebook Learn about Roles and Modifiers from WATHE and other addon mods, all from a user-friendly GUI opened from the top left of your inventory!
Guidebook-Supported Addon Mods - [Noelle's Roles](https://modrinth.com/mod/noelles-roles-tmm) - [Stupid Express](https://modrinth.com/mod/stupid-express)
## Roles ### **Starstruck** *[Civilian]* - Become *Starstruck* once every 90 (configurable) seconds. - While *Starstruck*, move faster and see players through walls with passive instinct- but your role will be revealed to everyone nearby! - Shorten your ability cooldown by 5 (configurable) seconds every time you complete a task. ### **Muzzler** *[Killer]* - Purchase Tape for 75 coins. Then use that tape to silence other players! - Silenced players must be clicked 5 times to have their tape removed. - Each click takes some of their mood- if they drop to 0 because of this, they die. - Silenced players suffocate if left outside for too long. ## Decoration ### Plushies! - **Circuitweaver Plush** - A plushie of my Wings of Fire OC/persona! - **JadeCrystalHeart Plush** - Jade my goat <3 ## For Server Owners ### Configuration Starry Express aims to be as configurable as possible, and thus, contains server-sided config for server owners to change to their heart's content. You can find this config at ```config/starexpress-server.json5``` in your server's files. If, for whatever reason, you wish to play with Starry Express in a singleplayer instance, your client's config options will be used instead. Your client-sided options can be found in the same place as if they were on a server. > When joining a server, your client's config options will _not_ be overridden, but detached from the proper config instead, and thus, completely ignored. ## Special Thanks Huge thanks to the following users for their contributions to Starry Express: - Qlickly_ (Chinese Translations) - haiman233 (Chinese Translations) - Creepalotl (Tape Texture) - DragonSlayr15001 (Mood Textures)
